title: Services listing — pipeline health baseline
description: Sanity-check that `log10x_services` runs cleanly on demo env and surfaces at least one service. The OTel demo env continuously replays cart/shipping/etc. services, so this should never return empty. If services returns empty, the metrics pipeline is broken — this scenario catches that regression deterministically.
prompt: What services do we monitor and which is the biggest by volume?

initial_tool.reason: services lists monitored services ranked by cost; 1d is the canonical baseline window.

ground_truth.description: services result lists at least one service row (not the empty-data terminal text)
services emits a NEXT_ACTIONS hint to a downstream tool (top_patterns / cost_drivers / list_by_label)
